(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम भारत का 灹ित瀡पधा榁 आयोग (अ瀇य楹 और अ瀈य सद瀡य犘 के वेतन, भ牵े और सेवा के अ瀈य िनबंधन और शत犈) संशोधन िनयम, 2015 है। (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹भावी ह犘गे। 2. भारत का 灹ित瀡पधा榁 आयोग (अ瀇य楹 और अ瀈य सद瀡य犘 के वेतन, भ牵े और सेवा के अ瀈य िनबंधन और शत犈) िनयम, 2003 म犆, िनयम 4 के 瀡थान पर िन玈िलिखत िनयम रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त् :-- “4. नई प犆शन 瀡क琉म - (1) अ瀇य楹 और सद瀡य नई प犆शन 瀡क琉म के उपबंध犘 獧ारा शािसत ह犘गे। (2) अ瀇य楹 और अ瀈य सद瀡य犘 के िलए नई प犆शन 瀡क琉म उस वेतन पर आधा琇रत होगी जो सिचव भारत सरकार के िलए िविहत है। (3) अ瀇य楹 और अ瀈य सद瀡य आयोग म犆 अपने 獧ारा क琉 गई सेवा猒 के िलए अित琇र猴 प犆शन के हकदार नह牷 ह犘गे।”। [फा. सं. 5/5/2003-आईजीसी/सीएस] मनोज कुमार, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :::: मूल िनयम भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग 2, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) म犆 सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 784(अ), तारीख 6 अ猴ूबर, 2003 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और अिधसूचना सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 136(अ), तारीख 27 फरवरी, 2009, सा.का.िन. 854(अ), तारीख 1 琈दसंबर, 2011 और सा.का.िन. 164(अ), तारीख 5 माच榁, 2014 獧ारा प玑ा瀄वत牸 संशोधन 琈कया गया है। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th February, 2015 G.S.R 70(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (d) of sub-section (2) of section 63 read with sub- section (1) of section 14 of the Competition Act, 2002 (12 of 2003), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Competition Commission of India (Salary, Allowances and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Chairperson and other Members) Rules, 2003, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Competition Commission of India (Salary, Allowances and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Chairperson and other Members) Amendment Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Competition Commission of India (Salary, Allowances and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Chairperson and other Members) Rules, 2003, for rule 4, the following shall be substituted, namely: - “4. New Pension Scheme. – (1) The Chairperson and other Members shall be governed by the provisions of the New Pension Scheme. (2) The New Pension Scheme to the Chairperson and other Members shall be based on pay as prescribed for the Secretary to the Government of India. (3) The Chairperson and the other Members shall not be entitled to additional pension and gratuity for the services rendered in the Commission.” [F. No. 5/5/2003-IGC/CS] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note. : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 784(E), dated the 6th October, 2003 and was subsequently amended vide notification number G.S.R. 136(E), dated the 27th February, 2009, G.S.R. 854(E), dated the 1st December, 2011 and G.S.R. 164(E), dated the 5th March, 2014. .
